allow: Bash(python -c "from handlers import handlers; print\(f'Handlers loaded: {len\(handlers\)}'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from handlers import handlers; print\(f'Handlers loaded: {len\(handlers\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import inspect; from amocrm.v2 import custom_field; print\(inspect.signature\(custom_field.TextCustomField.__init__\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from amocrm.v2 import custom_field; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(custom_field\); print\(src\)")
